calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Bal Raj Capur, Appellant/Defendant
Jennifer Gardyne, Respondent/Plaintiff

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Jennifer Gardyne, Respondent/Plaintiff, testififies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - Photos documenting apartment move-in conditions
Exhibit B - Photos documenting apartment move-out conditions

Bal Raj Capur, Appellant/Defendant, testifies on his own behalf:
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Statement of the account prepared by Mr. Capur
Exhibit 2 - photos of the apartment upon move-out (returned to party)

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Robert Stumpf, Clerk Danial Lemire, not reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-23-2017 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-23-2017 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
